sections.paragraph:
Original: אשּׁף

Transliteration: 'ashshâph

Phonetic: ash-shawf'

BDB Definition:

  1. necromancer, conjurer
  2. (TWOT) astrologer, enchanter, exorcist

Origin: from an unused root (probably meaning to lisp, i.e. practice enchantment)

TWOT entry: 181

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
